response.justification: While Bogdan brings strong software engineering fundamentals, 20 years of production shipping experience, and TypeScript expertise, he does not meet the core job requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His entry into GenAI/agent infrastructure is very recent (1 month at re:cinq), and critical skills—including Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM optimization—are not demonstrated on the resume. His MCP work shows promising trajectory but lacks the depth and breadth of AI systems expertise the Staff-level role demands.
strengths: Proven track record shipping production systems at scale (top-10 iOS app, millions of direct mails, real-time data systems handling millions of requests/second)
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise across full-stack contexts, with demonstrated ability to learn new languages and domains rapidly
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active entry into the GenAI/agentic systems space
concerns: Does not meet the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; current GenAI work is only 1 month old with unclear depth and scope
Python not listed in skills (required language); no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLMs, or multi-agent frameworks
Data pipeline experience is in traditional data integration, not ML/AI pipelines; no evidence of model evaluation frameworks, observability for AI systems, or LLM performance optimization

key_factors.factor: 8+ years AI solutions requirement not met
Strong shipping track record and software fundamentals
Missing vector DB, RAG, LLM, and multi-agent framework expertise
